summary: Motivated 17-year-old web developer and video editor from Nepal with experience building real-world web projects and editing videos. Started video editing in 2020 and web development in 2024. Passionate about learning new technologies and creating useful and creative digital projects.

experience.title: Independent Web Developer
experience.description: Developing personal web projects including chat applications and tracking websites. Learning frontend and backend development while building real-world projects.
achievements: Created anime and manga tracking website

experience.title: Video Editor
experience.description: Editing videos using Kinemaster and CapCut for personal and creative projects. Developed skills in cutting, transitions, effects, and timing.
achievements: Improved video quality and editing speed
